name: JJtorio
title: JJtorio
author: JJ
description: JJtorio is a work-in-progress overhaul that takes Factorio into an endless, procedurally generated universe. The early game stays light and fast (more reach, cheaper research); the depth begins once you earn the rocket silo, now gated behind the late-game 'megabase' techs. From there you reach orbit and push out to procedurally generated planets, each with its own class, resources, day length and gravity. Standalone - not compatible with Space Age or Space Exploration. Early work in progress. Community feedback welcome: email jjtmcmultiversal@gmail.com with the subject 'JJtorio'.
